languages.text: Планета, вокруг которой вращаются астероиды, невероятно радиоактивна. Чем ближе к ней будут подходить шаттлы, тем сильнее их облучит — безопасно лишь собирать то полезное, что находится на достаточном расстоянии от обнаженного ядра разорванного пустотного тела.

The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.
languages.original_text: Планета, вокруг которой вращаются астероиды, невероятно радиоактивна. Чем ближе к ней будут подходить шаттлы, тем сильнее их облучит — безопасно лишь собирать то полезное, что находится на достаточном расстоянии от обнаженного ядра разорванного пустотного тела.

traits.locale_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

languages.text: 小惑星群が公転している惑星は、放射能が非常に高い。シャトルがその惑星に近づけば近づくほど、放射線にさらされる。唯一の安全な方法は、破裂した惑星の露出した核から離れた場所に有用なものを集めることである。
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: 小惑星群が公転している惑星は、放射能が非常に高い。シャトルがその惑星に近づけば近づくほど、放射線にさらされる。唯一の安全な方法は、破裂した惑星の露出した核から離れた場所に有用なものを集めることである。

languages.text: El planeta que orbitan los asteroides presenta un nivel extremo de radiación. Cuanto más se acerquen las lanzaderas, más radiación recibirán. La única opción segura es recuperar todos los recursos útiles que estén a suficiente distancia del núcleo expuesto del planeta destruido.
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: El planeta que orbitan los asteroides presenta un nivel extremo de radiación. Cuanto más se acerquen las lanzaderas, más radiación recibirán. La única opción segura es recuperar todos los recursos útiles que estén a suficiente distancia del núcleo expuesto del planeta destruido.

languages.text: 这颗小行星带环绕的行星放射性极强。穿梭机越靠近，受到的辐射就越严重。唯一安全的做法，是远离破碎星体的裸露核心，仅在外围区域采集资源。
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: 这颗小行星带环绕的行星放射性极强。穿梭机越靠近，受到的辐射就越严重。唯一安全的做法，是远离破碎星体的裸露核心，仅在外围区域采集资源。

languages.text: Der Planet, den die Asteroiden umkreisen, ist unglaublich radioaktiv. Je näher ihm die Shuttles kommen, desto stärker werden sie verstrahlt. Die einzige sichere Option ist die Bergung sämtlicher Ressourcen, die weit genug vom freigelegten Kern des zerstörten Planetenkörpers entfernt sind.
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: Der Planet, den die Asteroiden umkreisen, ist unglaublich radioaktiv. Je näher ihm die Shuttles kommen, desto stärker werden sie verstrahlt. Die einzige sichere Option ist die Bergung sämtlicher Ressourcen, die weit genug vom freigelegten Kern des zerstörten Planetenkörpers entfernt sind.

languages.text: Asteroitlerin yörüngesinde döndüğü gezegen, inanılmaz derecede radyoaktif. Mekikler ona ne kadar yaklaşırsa o kadar radyasyona maruz kalacaklar. Tek güvenli seçenek, parçalanmış gezegen gövdesinin açığa çıkmış çekirdeğinden yeterince uzaktaki yararlı her şeyi toplamak.
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: Asteroitlerin yörüngesinde döndüğü gezegen, inanılmaz derecede radyoaktif. Mekikler ona ne kadar yaklaşırsa o kadar radyasyona maruz kalacaklar. Tek güvenli seçenek, parçalanmış gezegen gövdesinin açığa çıkmış çekirdeğinden yeterince uzaktaki yararlı her şeyi toplamak.

languages.text: La planète autour de laquelle gravitent les astéroïdes est particulièrement radioactive. Si les navettes s'en approchent trop, elles subiront des radiations. La meilleure solution consiste donc à récupérer tout ce qui peut l'être à distance raisonnable du noyau exposé du corps planétaire fracturé.
languages.original_text: The planet around which the asteroids are orbiting is incredibly radioactive. The closer the shuttles get to it, the more they will be irradiated — the only safe option is to gather anything useful that is far enough away from the exposed core of the ruptured planetary body.

traits.locale_text: La planète autour de laquelle gravitent les astéroïdes est particulièrement radioactive. Si les navettes s'en approchent trop, elles subiront des radiations. La meilleure solution consiste donc à récupérer tout ce qui peut l'être à distance raisonnable du noyau exposé du corps planétaire fracturé.
